category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Grails as a web application framework for Groovy; Apache Grails documentation describes the Grails framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://grails.apache.org/ and official Apache documentation/announcements use Apache Grails.
docs_sources: Official Apache Grails documentation index is https://grails.apache.org/documentation.html and latest docs are linked under https://grails.apache.org/docs/latest/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/apache/grails-core, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says web application framework for Groovy; official Apache Grails materials describe a Groovy-based web framework for the JVM.
